title: cnidoscolus urens
intro: Cnidoscolus urens, also known as the nettle tree or cowhage, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and analgesic effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the digestive system, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
